creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
"Alexander V. Ribchansky" <triosoft@triosoft.com.ua> writes:

>>Description:
> Port do not respect CFLAGS+= -fPIC without USE_GMAKE= YES so cannot be
> build on non-i386 arch. Please revert last commit.

Do you override CFLAGS in make.conf? Try to replace `=' with `+='.

ref. http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?1RN0I0-000OIF-Uu
